name: Famous Amos Chocolate Chip Cookies#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the butter or margarine, Crisco or corn oil, brown sugar, and sugar in a large bowl until well blended.
2. Add the eggs, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and vanilla to the mixture. Mix until smooth.
3. Gradually add the flour, flaked coconut, chocolate chips, and pecans. Stir just until a dough forms.
4. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls and place them 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes.
6. Remove from the baking sheets immediately and transfer to paper towels to cool.
These cookies freeze well, either before or after baking.
